0.1.2.en: Added Lightning detector and weather station.

0.1.3.en: Added Insight option to custom capabilities.

0.1.4.en: Added flow trigger for Air Quality changed. Fixed issue with settings not saving. Added logging to confirm server has started / show errors.

0.1.5.en: Updated battery percentage calculation for the soil moisture sensor and added an option to specify if the battery is type rechargeable.

0.1.6.en: Max. number of Soil Moisture meters is now 8. Time format of lightning strike can now be selected in the device Advanced settings. Lightning distance units fixed. Lightning flows fixed

0.1.7.en: Added PM10 and CO2, 5 in 1 meter

0.1.8.en: Added PM32, temperature and humidity meter

0.1.9.en: Fix links to store images for temperature and humidity monitor

0.1.10.en: Removed cloud tag that was accidentals added in lat submission

0.1.11.en: Added support for multiple temperature and humidity monitor (up to 8 channels).

0.1.12.en: Added support for WH55 Wireless Water Leak Detection Sensor (up to 4 channels) and the WN30 temperature sensor (up to 8 channels).

0.1.13.en: Fixed images for WH55 and WN30.

0.1.15.en: Added rain sensor. Cleaned up Flow triggers.

0.1.17.en: Fixed incorrect trigger call for PM25 device

0.1.19.en: Added WS80 support. Changed weather stations to sensor class so a capability can be shown on the tile.

0.1.20.en: Fixed path to store image for WS80.

0.1.21.en: Change the weather station and WS80 to use baromrelin (corrected) instead of baromabsin (absolute).

0.1.22.en: Change the weather station and WS80 to use baromrelin (corrected) instead of baromabsin (absolute).

0.1.23.en: Added number of hours since last rained with associated flow cards

0.1.24.en: Removed redundant Air Quality Index Flow trigger cards.

0.1.27.en: Fix typo in function name for triggerAQPM25AvgChanged.

0.1.30.en: Added option to change App wind units. Added Wind Direction (N, NW, etc). Added support for Ambient Weather format data.

0.1.31.en: Fix 'Max. Gust Strength' name being changed to 'Gust Strength' when units are changed.

0.1.34.en: Fix Dew Point calculation. Added Luminance to weather station.

0.1.35.en: Fix for custom wind speed units text when a device is added after the units are changed.

0.1.36.en: Added Station ID and Station type to device settings so it is easier to identify.

0.1.39.en: Added mph option for window speed.

0.1.40.en: Changed gateway class to sensor so it appears in the Climate section of Homey.

0.1.41.en: Added an app setting to show rain in mm or inches.

0.1.42.en: Added checks for 'measure_rain.total' existence to prevent errors.

0.1.43.en: Added option to show windspeed in knots.

0.1.44.en: Added option to adjust lightening time from UTC to Homey local time.

0.1.46.en: Remove Rain Rate and Rain Total capabilities if the data is not reported by the weather station.

0.1.47.en: Log timezone and language parameters to diagnose conversion from UTC to regional time.

0.1.48.en: Added support for units to the rain sensor.

0.1.49.en: Fix issue when changing units for a capability that had no options set.

0.1.50.en: Added support for the CO2 meter of the WS3910A.

0.1.51.en: Fixed missing decimals on rainfall data.

0.1.52.en: Add Laser Distance Sensor driver. Expanded soil moisture driver to 16 sensors.

0.1.53.en: Added link to gateway setup instructions in App Settings page.

0.1.54.en: Updated icon for the WS90 weather station.

0.2.0.en: Added support auto detection and configuration of gateways.

0.2.1.en: Removed rain rate from WS80. Fixed rain units for the Rain Sensor device. Fixed the Luminance value for WS80.

0.2.2.en: Fix issue with CO2 Flow trigger

0.2.3.en: Fix some Dutch translations. Changed the point at which the broadcast is sent.

0.2.4.en: Added Started / Stopped raining alarm and triggers.

0.2.6.en: Fix issue with rain rate and total rain not being reported by the WS90.

0.2.8.en: Fix issue with PM10 AQ triggers not being registered correctly.

0.2.10.en: Fix issue where the broadcast server would crash if the Homey local IP address could not be determined.

0.2.12.en: Added support for the Leaf Wetness sensor.

0.2.13.en: Fixed Dutch and German translations for the Leaf Wetness sensor.

0.2.14.en: Fixed Math.fabs issue. Ensure port is a number and valid. Added error handling for server start up. Added error handling for broadcast messages.

0.2.15.en: Corrected conditional checks for temperature and humidity in WeatherStationDevice as they had backward logic.

0.2.16.en: Added support for water leak sensor offline detection.

0.2.17.en: Added support for the WS20 Rain Sensor. Fix issue with incorrect Laser Distance sensor depth value (thanks to DaBozzz for the update).

0.2.18.en: Ensure Lighting detector battery is updated. Updated German translations.

0.2.19.en: Fix depth value for Laser Distance sensor (thanks to DaBozzz for the new update).

0.2.20.en: Fix battery status for wn20 Rain sensor.

0.2.21.en: Added a device setting to the weather station to ignore the piezo sensor values. Added a repair option to the WittFlow device to update the IP address.
